questionHtml: Sketch the graphs of y=g(x) and y=g-1(x) on the same set of axes, indicating the points where each graph crosses the coordinate axes.
markschemeHtml:
A1A1A1M1A1


Note: Award A1 for correct ‘shape’ of g (allow non-stationary point of inflexion)
Award A1 for each correct intercept of g
Award M1 for attempt to reflect their graph in y=x, A1 for completely correct g-1 including intercepts


[5 marks]

meta.title: Sketch the graphs of y=g(x) and y=g-1(x) on the same set of axes, indicating the points where each graph crosses the coordinate axes.
breadcrumbLabels: SL 2.2—Functions, notation domain, range and inverse as reflection
